content: **Diana:** Our division's integration PR https://github.com/kunchenguid/org-bench/pull/607 is now merged into main. I also reviewed Alice's PR, verified node tests and file:// browser flow, but did not merge it because main already contains the Diana artifact and Alice is now conflict-dirty against it.

**Edward:** Main moved to Diana's implementation at 38b65ad and my PR #611 was closed unmerged. I handled integrator turnaround for Dave #609 and Emma #610: tests/browser smoke were partially verified, but both are now DIRTY/CONFLICTING against the selected main artifact, so I commented that they cannot be merged as submitted.
